title: Canvas Background Themes
notes: Both the Drill Log and Shot Diagram now include a Canvas Background option under Settings.
The six classic background themes and six bold background themes are available from the in-app menu.
The hazard-style concept was replaced with a more blasting-themed Blast Placard option.
The selected background applies immediately and stays saved on the device for future sessions.
Shot Diagram recovery, Back to Menu, and desktop wheel zoom from m38.10 remain in place.
